slug.description: The project slug. Must match the slug of the source domain model. Example: deploy-rollback

layering_strategy.description: One entry per bounded context. Must be a JSON array, never a string.

context.description: Bounded context name from the domain model.

pattern.description: Internal layering pattern derived from domain model signals.

cqrs_applied.description: Whether CQRS applies to this context. Derived from command/query/event split in the domain model.

cqrs_read_models.description: Aggregates that need separate read models. Required (non-empty) when cqrs_applied is true. Must be a JSON array, never a string.

aggregate_consistency.description: Consistency model per aggregate. One entry per aggregate across all contexts. Must be a JSON array, never a string.

within_aggregate.description: Always strong/transactional — derived automatically, never requires human input.

cross_aggregate_events.description: Domain events emitted by this aggregate that drive cross-aggregate eventual consistency. Extracted directly from the domain model events array. Must be a JSON array, use [] if none.

integration_patterns.description: One entry per context map boundary. Single location for all cross-context decisions including API surface type. Must be a JSON array, use [] if no context map boundaries.

relationship_type.description: DDD relationship type from the domain model context map.

integration_style.description: Derived from relationship type and event volume.

api_surface_type.description: API surface type for this boundary. Derived from relationship type and event volume: open-host+high-event-volume=event-driven; open-host+low-event-volume=REST or GraphQL; no-external-consumers=none.

acl_needed.description: Whether an Anti-Corruption Layer is needed. Derived from relationship type: ACL=true, conformist=false.

translation_approach.description: Required (non-empty) when acl_needed is true. Describes the translation direction and mechanism.

consistency_guarantee.description: Consistency guarantee at this boundary (e.g. eventual via domain events, synchronous strong).

storage.description: Storage/persistence decision per aggregate. One entry per aggregate across all contexts. Must be a JSON array, never a string.

type.description: Storage type derived from aggregate characteristics: state-history/audit=event-store; complex-invariants+relational-queries=relational; variable-structure/sparse-fields=document.

transaction_boundary.description: Describes the transactional scope (e.g. single aggregate root, single bounded context).

cross_cutting.description: Global cross-cutting concerns. One set per design artifact, not per context.

authentication_layer.description: Always API boundary — derived from layering pattern, never requires human input.

authorization_layer.description: Always application service layer — derived from layering pattern, never requires human input.

error_propagation.description: Fully derived from the layering pattern. Never requires human input.

domain_exceptions.description: Invariant violations — never leave the domain layer.

application_exceptions.description: Use case failures — translated at the application boundary.

infrastructure_exceptions.description: I/O failures — translated at the adapter boundary.

translation_rules.description: How exceptions are mapped at each boundary.

trace_boundaries.description: Where distributed traces start and end.

logging_per_layer.description: What to log at each architectural layer. Must be a JSON array.

metrics_exposure.description: What metrics are exposed and at which boundary.

testing_strategy.description: Testing strategy per architectural layer. Derived from layering pattern and CQRS decisions. Must be a JSON array.

what_not_to_test.description: Required and non-empty. Prevents test pollution across layers.

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements. Always human-provided — the domain model does not carry NFRs. Must be a JSON array.

category.description: NFR category (e.g. latency, availability, throughput, compliance).

constraint.description: Measurable constraint with numeric value and unit (e.g. p99 latency < 200ms, availability >= 99.9%).

scope.description: global, or a specific context name, or a specific aggregate name.

source.description: NFRs are always human-provided. The engine never derives NFRs.

open_questions.description: Unresolved architectural ambiguities. Cross-session continuity signal. Must be a JSON array, use [] if none.

decision_log_entry.description: Entry to append to the artifact's decision_log. Omit on v1 if nothing meaningful to record.

changed_fields.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] if unknown.

rationale.description: Derivation rationale. Every derived decision must carry this. If overridden by human, retain source_signal/rule_applied/derived_value and add override_reason.

source_signal.description: The specific domain model element that triggered this decision (e.g. 'DesignDerivation context has 3 external adapters and domain logic isolated from I/O').

rule_applied.description: The derivation rule used (e.g. 'many external dependencies + I/O isolation needed → hexagonal').

override_reason.description: Human-provided justification when overriding a derived decision. Original rationale fields must be preserved.
